name: claude-cron
description: Command-line Claude automation for scheduled runs.

scripts.check: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$null = Get-Content -Raw claudecron.config.json | ConvertFrom-Json; $null = [scriptblock]::Create((Get-Content -Raw scripts\install-task.ps1)); $null = [scriptblock]::Create((Get-Content -Raw scripts\run-claude.ps1)); Write-Output 'check ok'"
